DEMAND FOR JURY FILED BY DEFENDANT MAXEY, KATHLEEN

THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT WAS REACHED BY STIPULATION. DEFENDANT, KATHLEEN B. MAXEY, SHALL PAY TO THE SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY THE SUM OF $909.00 IN BACK RENT AND DAMAGES UP TO AND INCLUDING 5-3I-95. DEFENDANT SHALL PAY AT LEAST $150.00 TO PLAINTIFF SFHA BY NO LATER THAN 5:00PM 6-2-95. ANOTHER $150.00 WILL BE PAID BY 6-16-95. DEFENDANT MAXEY SHALL ALSO PAY THE CURRENT MONTHLY RENT BY THE 10TH DAY OF THE MONTH IN WHICH IT IS DUE TOGETHER WITH AT LEAST $50.00 PER MONTH TOWARD SAID BACK RENT. THE FIFTY DOLLAR PAYMENTS WILL BEGIN 7-1-95. THE PAYMENTS SHALL BE MADE TO SFHA THROUGH THE SF DEPARTMENT OF SOCIAL SERVICES,S MODIFIED PAYMENTS PROGRAM. DEFENDANTS UNIT AT 45 DAKOTA IS BEING REHABILITATED AND DEFENDANT MAY BE MOVED TO ANOTHER SFHA UNIT DURING THIS PROCESS. IF DEFENDANT FAILS TO COMPLETE ALL PAYMENTS, PLAINTIFF, SFHA SHAL BE ENTITLED TO AN IMMEDIATE WRIT OF POSSESSION AND A JUDGMENT ALONG WITH ANY OUTSTANDING MONIES OWED BY DEFENDANT MAXEY.
TRIAL OFF CALENDAR

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MAXEY, KATHLEEN THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 45 DAKOTA ST, SF $292.50 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $292.50, LEASE FORFEITED
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE $3.63 FILED BY PLAINTIFF HOUSING AUTHORITY OF THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, A PUBLIC CORPORATION
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE
